headline: NiSource declares common stock dividend
summary: MERRILLVILLE, Ind., May 11, 2026--The board of directors of NiSource Inc. (NYSE: NI) today declared a quarterly common stock dividend payment of $0.30 cents per share, payable August 20, 2026, to stockholders of record at the close of business on July 31, 2026.

headline: Citigroup Maintains Neutral on NiSource, Raises Price Target to $49
summary: Citigroup  analyst Ryan Levine   maintains NiSource (NYSE:NI) with a Neutral and raises the price target from $47 to $49.
